summary: Deployed Phase 11 to production, ran live FE Credit and Ngu Hoa case-pack cases, and captured a final verdict from production truth.
issues: Image-bearing evidence acquisition is still not production-proven: run-0b5516a1d6 failed with STEP_STUCK_TIMEOUT before candidate persistence.
Timeout salvage now preserves collected-vs-persisted truth, but the product still cannot answer the Ngu Hoa image-bearing case.
notes: Text-led planner resilience and answer closeout are proven by run-a1c111f7a5. Visual-evidence acquisition remains the primary unresolved product gap.
